case_title: PING FEI FEI XIONG VS. CHUN PIU CHAN et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,237.26 FILED BY XIONG, PING FEI FEI AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, CHUN PIU BENNETT, CHAIREACE ANNE LIANG, MEI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF XIONG, PING FEI FEI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED NOV-03-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, MEI
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY XIONG, PING FEI FEI CHAN, CHUN PIU BENNETT, CHAIREACE ANNE LIANG, MEI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED NOV-03-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, CHUN PIU

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-20-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER--BING YUNG .PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF XIONG, PING FEI FEI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIANG, MEI $1,237.26 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,237.26, JUDGMENT AGAINST MEI LIANG, ONLY (NO PAYMENT REQUIRED BY OTHER DEFENDANTS) FOR FAULT FOR FOUR-CAR ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2012 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED NOV-03-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, CHAIREACE ANNE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, MEI
